style_rules.description: The top and bottom pieces must not be the same color.
Every outfit must include at least one pair of shoes.
Denim jeans are not allowed at formal or black-tie occasions.
If the temperature is below 16°C, the outfit must include outerwear.
The total cost of garments in any outfit must be under $250.
An outfit should use no more than 4 distinct colors across all garments.
No garment may be used in more than one outfit across the entire week.
For smart-casual occasions, at least one garment must be smart_casual formality.
If it is raining, do not wear denim outerwear.
Leather shoes must not be paired with synthetic fabric bottoms.
Every garment in an outfit must have a customer rating of at least 3.5.
For formal occasions, all garments must have a rating of at least 4.0.
